_meta.scope: Fake-name/wrong-brand cleanup round 7, found during batch-09 prep. Web-verified 2026-07-21.
_meta.provenance: Valaya pyramid from the OFFICIAL Parfums de Marly page; Can Can from retailer listings. No scraped content.

replacement.name: Valaya
replacement.description: Creamy white flowers over clean musk and akigalawood. A veil of fresh linen with an evening glow.
replacement.note: WRONG-BRAND REPAIR: Leilani is a Parfums d'Elmar fragrance, not Parfums de Marly (verified 2026-07-21). Replaced with a real, current, popular PdM feminine. Pyramid from the OFFICIAL PdM product page.

replacement.name: Can Can
replacement.description: Juicy clementine over orchid and warm amber. Cabaret-coded and built for nights out.
replacement.note: FAKE-NAME REPAIR: no Paris Hilton 'Night' exists in her line (verified 2026-07-21). Can Can matches this row's Floral/Vanilla/Amber evening profile and remains widely sold. Pyramid from retailer listings; flagged for verification.
